==========================
Unsupported Python version
==========================
This version of shredi requires Python 3.8, but you're trying to
install it on Python 2.7.
This may be because you are using a version of pip that doesn't
understand the python_requires classifier. Make sure you
have pip >= 9.0 and setuptools >= 24.2, then try again:
 $ python -m pip install --upgrade pip setuptools
 $ python -m pip install shredi
This will install the latest version of shredi which works on your
version of Python. If you can't upgrade your pip (or Python), request
an older version of shredi:
 $ python -m pip install "shredi<2"
